confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of loop deployment and placement. Camera angle allows good assessment of loop position relative to marked line. Some uncertainty about exact mm precision of placement due to camera resolution.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from marked line - camera resolution limits precise measurement
Whether tail cutting was performed - not clearly visible in final frames
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth loop deployment and precise placement. Total time of 42 seconds places this in the expert range (20-40s benchmark). No apparent penalties observed.
strengths: Overall time well within expert range
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly faster cinching phase to achieve sub-40s expert benchmark
Ensure tail cutting is clearly completed if required
